description: 16 PICTURES OF PARIS IN RUINS A PEACE ARGUMENT jsgfdgdfg Dangers f the Great War t European Civilization Pointed Out in Pamphlet Which Tells f Explorers of a Century Hence Visiting Wastes Which Were Once the Great Capitals of Europe JUST before the breaking out of the present great war a brochure call ing attention to its dangers to European civilization was on the point of appearing simultaneously in all the capitals A wealthy peace society which has the work in charge counts on making its general publication imme diately if still possible It is entitled Guide Ito the Ruins of Europe and is supposed to be compiled in America a hundred years from now for the use of American Australian and Oriental explorers in the style of Macauleys New Zealander wanting to visit the piles of ruins that were once proud capitals and cities blessed with art industry and commerce before the great war destroyed alike the popula tions and their centres and left Europe a waste sparsely inhabited by scat tered communities of survivors without strength or ambition to restore civili zation We give herewith selections from the chapter entitled Paris PARIS ruins of ancient capital of France
